description_long: This doll features a striking, stylized head with pale blue skin, large red eyes, and a dramatic facial expression with its tongue sticking out. The hair is short, dark blue, and voluminous, styled in a bob cut, and is adorned with a large, textured red bow that sits prominently on top. The bow has four wide, pointed loops and a knotted center, adding a whimsical yet slightly eerie touch. The face is highly expressive, with exaggerated features including wide, intense eyes and a mischievous, open mouth. The neck is wrapped with a black ribbon tied in a bow, and the overall design is reminiscent of gothic or horror-themed dolls. The back of the head is smooth and rounded, with the bow and hair forming the main visual elements.
description: A gothic-style doll head with pale blue skin, large red eyes, a dramatic red bow, and short dark blue hair. The face is highly expressive and slightly eerie.
description_view_0: Front view shows the doll's intense facial expression, large red eyes, open mouth with tongue out, and the full shape of the red bow.
description_view_1: Left side view highlights the bow's three-dimensional structure and the layered, voluminous hair.
description_view_2: Rear view displays the smooth, rounded back of the head, the full width of the bow, and the hair's texture.
description_view_3: Right side view mirrors the left, showing the bow's projection and the hair's layered cut.
attribute_clothing_style: The doll wears a black ribbon tied around the neck, with no visible garments or patterned clothing, evoking a gothic or horror-inspired accessory style.
attribute_pose: The doll's head is upright with no visible body, arms, or legs; the facial orientation is forward-facing with a static, expressive quality.
attribute_facial_expression: The doll has a wide-eyed, intense expression with large red eyes, raised eyebrows, and an open mouth with the tongue sticking out, suggesting surprise or mischief.
attribute_hair_style: Short, straight, dark blue bob with voluminous layers, partially covered by a large red bow.
